quotes.quote_text: “ Whatever I do is done in a hurry , ”

context.quote_text: “ I am sure , ”

“ if it was not for such good friends , I do not know what would become of her , for she is very ill indeed , and suffers a vast deal , though with the greatest patience in the world , which is always the way with her , for she has , without exception , the sweetest temper I ever met with . I often tell my other girls they are nothing to _ her _ . You have a sweet room here , Mr. Bingley , and a charming prospect over that gravel walk . I do not know a place in the country that is equal to Netherfield . You will not think of quitting it in a hurry , I hope , though you have but a short lease . ”
“ and therefore if I should resolve to quit Netherfield , I should probably be off in five minutes . At present , however , I consider myself as quite fixed here . ”
“ That is exactly what I should have supposed of you , ”

quotes.quote_text: “ and therefore if I should resolve to quit Netherfield , I should probably be off in five minutes . At present , however , I consider myself as quite fixed here . ”

context.quote_text: “ if it was not for such good friends , I do not know what would become of her , for she is very ill indeed , and suffers a vast deal , though with the greatest patience in the world , which is always the way with her , for she has , without exception , the sweetest temper I ever met with . I often tell my other girls they are nothing to _ her _ . You have a sweet room here , Mr. Bingley , and a charming prospect over that gravel walk . I do not know a place in the country that is equal to Netherfield . You will not think of quitting it in a hurry , I hope , though you have but a short lease . ”
“ Whatever I do is done in a hurry , ”
“ That is exactly what I should have supposed of you , ”
“ You begin to comprehend me , do you ? ”

quotes.quote_text: “ You begin to comprehend me , do you ? ”

context.quote_text: “ and therefore if I should resolve to quit Netherfield , I should probably be off in five minutes . At present , however , I consider myself as quite fixed here . ”
“ That is exactly what I should have supposed of you , ”
“ Oh yes -- I understand you perfectly . ”
“ I wish I might take this for a compliment ; but to be so easily seen through , I am afraid , is pitiful . ”

quotes.quote_text: “ Oh yes -- I understand you perfectly . ”

context.quote_text: “ That is exactly what I should have supposed of you , ”
“ You begin to comprehend me , do you ? ”
“ I wish I might take this for a compliment ; but to be so easily seen through , I am afraid , is pitiful . ”
“ That is as it happens . It does not necessarily follow that a deep , intricate character is more or less estimable than such a one as yours . ”

quotes.quote_text: “ I wish I might take this for a compliment ; but to be so easily seen through , I am afraid , is pitiful . ”

context.quote_text: “ You begin to comprehend me , do you ? ”
“ Oh yes -- I understand you perfectly . ”
“ That is as it happens . It does not necessarily follow that a deep , intricate character is more or less estimable than such a one as yours . ”
“ Lizzy , ”

quotes.quote_text: “ That is as it happens . It does not necessarily follow that a deep , intricate character is more or less estimable than such a one as yours . ”

context.quote_text: “ Oh yes -- I understand you perfectly . ”
“ I wish I might take this for a compliment ; but to be so easily seen through , I am afraid , is pitiful . ”
“ Lizzy , ”
“ remember where you are , and do not run on in the wild manner that you are suffered to do at home . ”
“ I wish I might take this for a compliment ; but to be so easily seen through , I am afraid , is pitiful . ”
“ That is as it happens . It does not necessarily follow that a deep , intricate character is more or less estimable than such a one as yours . ”
“ remember where you are , and do not run on in the wild manner that you are suffered to do at home . ”
“ I did not know before , ”

quotes.quote_text: “ remember where you are , and do not run on in the wild manner that you are suffered to do at home . ”

context.quote_text: “ That is as it happens . It does not necessarily follow that a deep , intricate character is more or less estimable than such a one as yours . ”
“ Lizzy , ”
“ I did not know before , ”
“ that you were a studier of character . It must be an amusing study . ”

quotes.quote_text: “ Yes ; but intricate characters are the _ most _ amusing . They have at least that advantage . ”

context.quote_text: “ I did not know before , ”
“ that you were a studier of character . It must be an amusing study . ”
“ The country , ”
“ can in general supply but few subjects for such a study . In a country neighbourhood you move in a very confined and unvarying society . ”

quotes.quote_text: “ But people themselves alter so much , that there is something new to be observed in them for ever . ”

context.quote_text: “ The country , ”
“ can in general supply but few subjects for such a study . In a country neighbourhood you move in a very confined and unvarying society . ”
“ Yes , indeed , ”
“ I assure you there is quite as much of _ that _ going on in the country as in town . ”
